service.name: AssemblyAI API
service.description_for_ai: AI-powered speech-to-text and audio intelligence. Transcribe audio files or streams. Speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, topic detection, PII redaction, content moderation, auto chapters. Best for processing audio content at scale.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Transcribe audio file to text with timestamps, speaker labels, and AI insights. Submit URL or upload file. Async — returns job ID then poll for result.

audio_url.description: Public URL to audio file (mp3, mp4, wav, m4a, ogg)

language_code.description: en, ru, de, fr, es, etc. Auto-detected if omitted

capabilities.description_for_ai: Poll for transcription result after submitting job. Check status field: queued→processing→completed/error.

agent_hints.async_flow: 1) POST to /transcript with audio_url → get id. 2) Poll GET /transcript/{id} until status=completed. Usually 30-60s for 1h audio.
agent_hints.streaming: For real-time use WebSocket endpoint wss://api.assemblyai.com/v2/realtime/ws
